title: Creamy Tahini & Sumac Chicken Flatbreads
summary: Warm flatbreads piled high with juicy leftovers from your Sumac Chicken & Roasted Veg Traybake batch, with creamy tahini yoghurt and a fresh, zingy herb salad. A super speedy midweek dinner or lunch.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Sumac Chicken & Roasted Veg Traybake batch recipe.
Quarter and thinly slice the spring onions lengthways. Pick the parsley leaves, discarding the stalks. Add both to a bowl of ice water and leave to curl and crisp up.

In a small bowl, stir the tahini and Greek yoghurt together, loosening with a splash of cold water if needed. Taste and season with salt, pepper and a touch of honey or sugar if you find it too bitter.
Reheat the chicken and veggies from the sumac chicken traybake and toast the flatbreads in a dry frying pan or under the grill until warmed through.
Drain the spring onions, then toss with the parsley, sumac and a pinch of salt.
Serve the flatbreads onto plates. Top with the tahini yoghurt and reheated Sumac Chicken & Roasted Veg Traybake. Finish with the sumac onion salad.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
